name: Sea Slaw (Fgdn81a)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Shrimp; fresh or frozen, Peeled and deveined
1/4 cup Green onions; tops included, Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the shrimp until cooked through. Reserve a few whole shrimp for garnish and chop the remainder.
2. In a bowl, toss shredded cabbage, cooled cooked shrimp, and sliced green onions.
3. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, lemon juice, sugar (if using), seasoned salt, dry mustard, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce.
4. Pour the dressing over the shrimp and vegetable mixture and toss to coat evenly.
5. Add salt to taste.
6. Garnish with reserved whole shrimp.
7. Chill for at least 6 hours (or overnight).
